fluentia.description: AI language tutor with persistent memory and real tool use via Anthropic API. Learn languages through adaptive exercises, flashcards, dialogue simulations, and personalized error analysis.

n8n-instagram.description: Automated content pipeline for 2 Instagram accounts. Claude Sonnet picks the topic and writes the copy, Pexels provides photos, Cloudinary builds the carousel. Human approval via Telegram before publishing.

prospectai.description: Commercial prospecting tool combining Google Places with Claude to analyze leads and generate personalized outreach scripts per business type.

mentoria.description: AI-powered educational tutor for K-12 students. Explains subjects and generates flashcards by topic via Anthropic API.

pet-control.description: Pet health management app: vaccines, medications, appointments, hygiene, weight, and feeding. Available on the Play Store in open testing.

go-finances.description: Personal finance app with Google and Apple authentication (OAuth), spending breakdown by category, and income/expense totals.

daily-diet.description: Diet tracking app with meal logging by time, on/off diet classification, and cloud persistence via Firebase Firestore.

ploter.description: Modular website blueprints for small businesses with booking flow, admin dashboard, and PIX payment module. Live case: Ploter.com — print shop with SEO and Google Search Console configured.

portfolio.description: This portfolio — bilingual (PT/EN) with real-time language switching, React Router, Radix UI, and continuous deployment on Vercel.

tic-tac-toe.description: Mobile tic-tac-toe game built with React Native and TypeScript. Game logic, win detection, and responsive UI built from scratch. Designed for Play Store publishing with Google Ads.

block-blast.description: Mobile block puzzle game with fitting mechanics and score system. Built with React Native. Designed for Play Store publishing with Google Ads.

sudoku-arena.description: Mobile Sudoku with board generation, move validation, and difficulty system. Built with React Native. Designed for Play Store publishing with Google Ads.

translation.about1: Hi, my name is Ighor Santiago and I'm a mobile developer
translation.about2: I started developing with Java but adopted the React Native framework with TypeScript since the beginning of 2020.
translation.about3: Since the beginning of college I've been working with systems analysis, first at IBM and currently at Global Hitss.
translation.about4: I've been developing some apps in the courses I take and I have two apps that I want to publish in stores.
translation.about5: I have a bachelor's degree in Information Systems and I'm certified in mobile development by Rocketseat.
translation.about6: Furthermore, I participated in several Rockeseat Ominstack and Next Level Weeks. I have a certificate in Logic programming and
translation.about7: Java training at Caelum and I'm starting to do Alura, starting with the React Native Testing course.
translation.about8: I'm always studying, I have team spirit, good communication, resilience and organization.
